_notes.max_per_tx: Max USDC per single transaction. Matches contract: 5_000_000 stroops
_notes.daily_cap: Max USDC per rolling calendar day UTC. Matches contract: 50_000_000 stroops
_notes.allowed_destinations: Stellar G-addresses only. Use ["*"] to allow any recipient.
_notes.currency: Token used for all payments — must match the token passed to the contract constructor
